26. Inauspiciousness of Planets.
A planet is fully inauspicious, if it is in its debilitation; it is somewhat better in inimical House. Its
inauspicious effects are nil, if it is exalted, ? in friendly House, ? in own House and ? in
Mlatrikona Rasi.
27. The planetary combination,
that produces Utpata, the planet, that is combust by the Sun, with less brilliance, which is in
debilitation, in enemys camp, or, that is defeated in planetary war: such a planet not only
loses its potency to be auspicious, but also becomes capable of bestowing malefic effects in
full.
28-30. Effects According to Exaltation etc.
A planet in exaltation gives all kinds of wealth. It confers ministerial-ship, or leadership over Army,
if in Mlatrikona Rasi. If it is in own House, it gives happiness, money, grains, wealth etc. In a
friendly House, it gives fame, splendour, abundant good fortune, long-lasting wealth and also
wealth through king.
